chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1659 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7100/2023 3. For hearing of main case 05-03-2024 Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General a/w ASI / I.O Riaz Ali Korai of PS Pano Akil.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- I.O has filed statement stating that case has been disposed of under ‘C’ class. None present for the petitioner, however this petition has served its purpose, is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
